message:
feat(progress): add standalone FileSizeColumn, DownloadColumn, and TransferSpeedColumn

Introduces three new standalone renderable components for displaying file
transfer information independent of ProgressBar, enabling flexible composition
in custom progress displays.

FileSizeColumn:
- Displays a single file size value in human-readable format
- Configurable unit system (binary/decimal) and precision
- Customizable style (default: green)
- Methods: new(), unit(), precision(), style(), set_size(), render()

DownloadColumn:
- Displays "current / total" format for download progress (e.g., "1.5 MB / 10 MB")
- Shared unit suffix optimization (shows unit once when both use same scale)
- Separate styles for current, separator, and total values
- Methods: new(), unit(), precision(), *_style(), set_current(), render()

TransferSpeedColumn:
- Displays transfer speed in human-readable format (e.g., "2.3 MB/s")
- Factory method from_transfer(bytes, duration) for easy calculation
- Configurable unit system and precision
- Methods: new(), from_transfer(), unit(), style(), set_speed(), render()

All columns implement render() returning Vec<Segment> for composition with
other renderables, and render_plain() for simple string output.

Import adds filesize module reference for format_speed function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
